meaning: adj.(位置或时间)最先的,最初的,最重要的adv.首要地,首先
examples: It is first and foremost a trade agreement.
This question has been foremost in our minds recently.
He does a little teaching, but first and foremost he's a writer.
Sebastian%20FWIS%202013 Sustainable energy is one of the foremost challenges of the next few decades.
The park, Tanzania's most remote and one of its most alluring, is first and foremost a chimpanzee sanctuary.
